---
title: "National Trends" 
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev = "ragg_png"
)

source("prep/00_library.R")
source("prep/01_functions.R")
source("prep/dataframes.R")

# load additional packages needed for this QMD
library(shiny)
```

```{r}
num_people_current   <- sum(parole_eligibility_table_2020$current_count, na.rm = TRUE)
num_people_1_5_years <- sum(parole_eligibility_table_2020$future_1_5_years_count, na.rm = TRUE)
```

::: narrow-section
```{r}
htmltools::div(
div(id = "important-text", 
    HTML("Understanding the impact of prison sentencing systems and parole on countless lives and the opportunity to reduce prison popualtions and improve public safety.<br><br>")))

# combine info in one row and center
# highlighted national trends numbers
htmltools::div(
  style = "display:flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: center;",
  div(style = "margin-right: 2.7em;", 
      id = "highlight-text", 
      formattable::comma(num_people_current, digits = 0)),
  div(id = "highlight-text", 
      formattable::comma(num_people_1_5_years, digits = 0)
      )
)

# combine info in one row and center
# highlighted titles for national trends numbers
htmltools::div(
  style = "display:flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: center;",
  div(style = "margin-right: 10em;", 
      id = "bold-text", 
      HTML("Currently Eligible for<br>Parole but in Prison")),
  div(id = "bold-text", 
      HTML("Eligible for Parole in<br>the next 1-5 years"))
)

```
:::

<br><br>

```{r}
# create a vector of all states
all_states <- state.name

# parole_eligibility_table_2020 created in parole_eligibility_ncrp.R
map_data <- parole_eligibility_table_2020 %>% 
  # add missing states
  complete(state = all_states) %>% 
  
  mutate(current_perc = current_perc*100,
         future_1_5_years_perc  = future_1_5_years_perc*100,
         missing_perc = missing_perc*100,
         
         state_abb = state.abb[match(state, state.name)],
         
         tooltip = 
           paste0("<b>", state, "</b><br><br>",
                  "Percent of Prison Population<br> Currently Eligible for Release:<br><b>",
                   paste(round(current_perc, 0), "%</b>", sep = ""), "<br><br>",
                  "Percent of Prison Population<br> Eligible for Parole in the Next 1-5 Years:<br><b>",
                   paste(round(future_1_5_years_perc, 0), "%</b>", sep = ""), "<br><br>",
                 "Percent of Prison Population<br> with Missing Parole Eligibility Data:<br><b>",
                   paste(round(missing_perc, 0), "%</b>", sep = ""), "<br><br>",
                 "Total Prison Population:<br><b>",
                   formattable::comma(yearendpop, digits = 0), "</b>"),
                  tooltip = str_replace_all(tooltip, "NA%", "No Data")) %>% 
  
  mutate(datalabel = ifelse(is.na(current_perc),
                            paste0("", state_abb, ""),
                            paste0("<p style=", "text-align:center", ">",
                                   state_abb, "", "<br>",
                                   round(current_perc, 0), "%</p>")),
         
         currentperclabel = paste0(round(current_perc, 0), "%"),
         currentperclabel = str_replace_all(currentperclabel, "NA%", "No Data")) 
```

```{r}
# get minimum and maximum value
min_map <- min(map_data$current_perc, na.rm = TRUE)
max_map <- max(map_data$current_perc, na.rm = TRUE)

# create hex map
map_percent <- highchart(height = 580) %>%
  
  hc_chart(marginTop = -6) %>% 
  
  hc_add_series_map(
    map = hex_gj,
    df = map_data,
    joinBy = "state_abb",
    value = "current_perc",
    dataLabels = list(enabled = TRUE, format = "{point.datalabel}",
                      style = list(fontSize = "14px",
                                   fontWeight = "regular",
                                   fontFamily = "Graphik",
                                   textOutline = 0)),
    nullColor = "#e8e8e8",
    accessibility = list(
      enabled = TRUE,
      keyboardNavigation = list(enabled = TRUE),
      point = list(valueDescriptionFormat = "{point.state}, {point.currentperclabel}"))) %>%
  
  hc_colorAxis(min = min_map,
               max = max_map,
               stops = color_stops(4, gradient_colors),
               labels = list(format = "{value}%",
                             style = list(fontSize = "14px"))) %>%
  
  hc_legend(align = "right",
            verticalAlign = "bottom",
            layout = "vertical",
            symbolHeight = 200,
            symbolWidth = 25,
            x = -25,
            y = 0) %>%
  
  hc_xAxis(title = "") %>%
  hc_yAxis(title = "") %>%
  
  hc_tooltip(formatter = JS("function(){return(this.point.tooltip)}")) %>%
  hc_add_theme(hc_theme_map_jc) %>%
  
  hc_plotOptions(series = list(animation = FALSE,
                               cursor = "pointer",
                               borderWidth = 3),
                 accessibility = list(enabled = TRUE,
                                      keyboardNavigation = list(enabled = TRUE),
                                      linkedDescription = paste0("TEXT"),
                                      landmarkVerbosity = "one"),
                 area = list(accessibility = list(description = paste0("TEXT")))
  )

# parole_eligibility_table_2020 created in parole_eligibility_ncrp.R
map_data <- parole_eligibility_table_2020 %>% 
  # add missing states
  complete(state = all_states) %>% 
  
  mutate(state_abb = state.abb[match(state, state.name)],
         
         tooltip = 
           paste0("<b>", state, "</b><br><br>",
                  "Number of People in Prison<br> Currently Eligible for Release:<br><b>",
                   paste(formattable::comma(current_count, 0), "</b>", sep = ""), "<br><br>",
                  "Number of People in Prison<br> Eligible for Parole in the Next 1-5 Years:<br><b>",
                   paste(formattable::comma(future_1_5_years_count, 0), "</b>", sep = ""), "<br><br>",
                 "Number of People in Prison<br> with Missing Parole Eligibility Data:<br><b>",
                   paste(formattable::comma(missing_count, 0), "</b>", sep = ""), "<br><br>",
                 "Total Prison Population:<br><b>",
                   formattable::comma(yearendpop, digits = 0), "</b>"),
                  tooltip = str_replace_all(tooltip, "NA", "No Data")) %>% 
  
  mutate(datalabel = ifelse(is.na(current_count),
                            paste0("", state_abb, ""),
                            paste0("<p style=", "text-align:center", ">",
                                   state_abb, "", "<br>",
                                   formattable::comma(current_count, 0), "</p>")),
         
         currentcountlabel = paste0(round(current_count, 0), "%"),
         currentcountlabel = str_replace_all(currentcountlabel, "NA%", "No Data")) 

# create hex map for counts
map_count <- highchart(height = 580) %>%
  
  hc_chart(marginTop = -6) %>% 
  
  hc_add_series_map(
    map = hex_gj,
    df = map_data,
    joinBy = "state_abb",
    value = "current_count",
    dataLabels = list(enabled = TRUE, format = "{point.datalabel}",
                      style = list(fontSize = "14px",
                                   fontWeight = "regular",
                                   fontFamily = "Graphik",
                                   textOutline = 0)),
    nullColor = "#e8e8e8",
    accessibility = list(
      enabled = TRUE,
      keyboardNavigation = list(enabled = TRUE),
      point = list(valueDescriptionFormat = "{point.state}, {point.currentcountlabel}"))) %>%
  
  hc_colorAxis(stops = color_stops(4, gradient_colors),
               labels = list(format = "{value}",
                             style = list(fontSize = "14px"))) %>%
  
  hc_legend(align = "right",
            verticalAlign = "bottom",
            layout = "vertical",
            symbolHeight = 200,
            symbolWidth = 25,
            x = -25,
            y = 0) %>%
  
  hc_xAxis(title = "") %>%
  hc_yAxis(title = "") %>%
  
  hc_tooltip(formatter = JS("function(){return(this.point.tooltip)}")) %>%
  hc_add_theme(hc_theme_map_jc) %>%
  
  hc_plotOptions(series = list(animation = FALSE,
                               cursor = "pointer",
                               borderWidth = 3),
                 accessibility = list(enabled = TRUE,
                                      keyboardNavigation = list(enabled = TRUE),
                                      linkedDescription = paste0("TEXT"),
                                      landmarkVerbosity = "one"),
                 area = list(accessibility = list(description = paste0("TEXT")))
  )
```

```{r}
htmltools::div(
div(id = "graph-title", 
    HTML("People Currently Eligible for Parole but in Prison")))
```

```{r}
tags$style(type = "text/css", ".nav-tabs { justify-content: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #fff;}")
tabsetPanel(
  id = "tabsetpanelmap",
  tabPanel("Percent of People",
           br(),
           map_percent
           ),
  tabPanel("Number of People",
           br(),
           map_count)
)
```

<br>

<div class="table-container">
```{r}
table_data <- parole_eligibility_table_2020 %>% 
  select(state, 
         yearendpop, 
         current_count, current_perc,
         future_1_5_years_count, future_1_5_years_perc, missing_count, missing_perc)

reactable(table_data,
          style = hc_reactable_style,
          theme = hc_reactable_theme,
          defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                 align = "right",
                                 minWidth = 100),
          compact = TRUE,
          fullWidth = FALSE,
          defaultPageSize = 50,
          columnGroups = list(
              colGroup(name = "Currently Eligible for Parole", 
                       columns = c("current_perc", "current_count")),
              colGroup(name = "Eligible for Parole in the Next 1-5 Years",
                       columns = c("future_1_5_years_perc", "future_1_5_years_count")),
              colGroup(name = "Missing Parole Eligibility Data", 
                       columns = c("missing_perc", "missing_count"))
          ),
          columns = list(
            state         = colDef(name = "State", 
                                   minWidth = 130, 
                                   align = "left"),
            current_perc  = colDef(name = "Percent of Prison Population", 
                                   format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, 
                                                      digits = 1),
                                   style = list(position = "sticky", 
                                                borderRight = "1px solid #d3d3d3"),
                                   headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "normal")),
            future_1_5_years_perc   = colDef(name = "Percent of Prison Population", 
                                   format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, 
                                                      digits = 1),
                                   style = list(position = "sticky", 
                                                borderRight = "1px solid #d3d3d3"),
                                   headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "normal")),
            missing_perc  = colDef(name = "Percent of Prison Population", 
                                   format = colFormat(percent = TRUE, 
                                                      digits = 1),
                                   headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "normal")),
            yearendpop    = colDef(name = "Prison Population",
                                   style = list(position = "sticky", 
                                                borderRight = "1px solid #d3d3d3"),
                                   headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "bold")),
            current_count = colDef(name = "Number of People",
                                   headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "normal")),
            future_1_5_years_count  = colDef(name = "Number of People",
                                   headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "normal")),
            missing_count = colDef(name = "Number of People",
                                   headerStyle = list(fontWeight = "normal"))
          )
)
```
</div>
<br>
<div id="footnote">Source: NCRP Year End Population (2020)</div>
